shared_properties: Player sheet keeps a 120x180 px body scale per frame and a robe silhouette that reads cleanly against the duel lane.
All state clips keep the wand hand on the screen-right side to preserve counter-cast direction clarity.
differences: This sheet packs Idle, Reflect_Ready, Reflect_Success, and Reflect_Fail states into one deterministic atlas with 22 total frames.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy player concept
reference_images.purpose: Student body proportion, robe sleeve length, and wand pose grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Camera scale, floor contact, and duel-stage pose framing grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy GDD
reference_images.purpose: State counts, 120x180 frame size, and gameplay role grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use TextureAtlasLayout with 22 frames and a state-clip table stored in a ReflectStateVisual component.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/student_reflector_state_sheet.png through AssetServer and pair it with a clip-map resource keyed by asset_key.
runtime_notes: Spawn frame origin at x=420 px and y=220 px measured from the lower-left of the battle canvas.
Clip ranges are Idle 0-7, Reflect_Ready 8-11, Reflect_Success 12-17, Reflect_Fail 18-21.
Keep foot contact aligned to y=170 px in every frame so the lane baseline stays locked.

context.role: Primary player duelist art used for all reflection timing outcomes.
context.usage: Visible whenever the player is on the duel floor, including idle, ready, success, and fail results.

deliverables.notes: 22-frame atlas arranged as 11 columns by 2 rows.
State clip map for Idle, Reflect_Ready, Reflect_Success, and Reflect_Fail.

acceptance_criteria: Sheet size is exactly 1320x360 px with 22 used frames at 120x180 px each.
Idle uses 8 frames, Reflect_Ready uses 4 frames, Reflect_Success uses 6 frames, and Reflect_Fail uses 4 frames with the clip ranges declared in specs.animation.state_clips.
Every frame keeps the robe hem aligned to y=170 px and the wand tip inside the 120x180 frame bounds.
